tools.name: search_restaurants
tools.description: Find restaurants based on location or distance constraints (for example, within commuting distance of an office). Returns a list of candidate restaurants with basic identifying information only. Use this first to discover which restaurants are available.

tools.name: get_restaurant_profile
tools.description: Get business-relevant details for one or more restaurants, such as noise level and typical price per person. Use this to check whether a restaurant fits conversation and budget constraints.

tools.name: get_menu_index
tools.description: Get links to a restaurant’s menu (HTML page or PDF, if available). Use this when you need to inspect menu contents to evaluate dietary requirements such as vegetarian options.
